zh.lifeSummary: Mungo Aitken是John Atkin和Margaret McLean的兒子，於1501年1月1日出生在蘇格蘭艾丁波。他於1519年10月11日與Janet Gilchrist在蘇格蘭艾丁波結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1571年1月1日在蘇格蘭享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mungo Aitken是John Atkin和Margaret McLean的儿子，于1501年1月1日出生在苏格兰艾丁波。他于1519年10月11日与Janet Gilchrist在苏格兰艾丁波结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1571年1月1日在苏格兰享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Aitken
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: from the Older Scots personal name Aitken, a pet form of Adam . Compare Aiken and Atkin .

variants.name: Adam
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Pasquale, Adriano, Aldo, Amadeo, Amedeo, Antonio, Armando, Cristiano, Donato, Emilio, Erasmo, Eugenio, Gerado, Marco, Salvatore, Saverio.
Italian: patronymic from the personal name Adamo, an equivalent of Adam .

variants.name: Aiken
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of Scottish   Aitken  .
History: Aiken is the name of a NH family that was prominent in the 18th century; also of a Charleston family descended from William Aiken, who emigrated from Antrim in Ireland to Charleston c. 1800.

variants.name: Aitkens
meanings: Scottish: patronymic from the personal name   Aitken  .
English: variant of Atkin with genitival or excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Mungo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain derivation. It is recorded as the byname of St Kentigern, the 6th-century apostle of south-west Scotland and north-west England. Having been glossed in Latin by his biographer as carissimus amicus ‘dearest friend’, the name (in its Brythonic form Munghu) was taken to represent later Welsh fy nghi ‘my dog’, i.e. ‘my pet’.

en.lifeSummary: Mungo Aitken was born on 1 January 1501, in Edinburgh, Scotland as the son of John Atkin and Margaret McLean. He married Janet Gilchrist on 11 October 1519, in Edinburgh, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 1 January 1571, in Scotland, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Mungo Aitken est né le 1 janvier 1501, à Edinburgh, Écosse, fils de John Atkin et Margaret McLean. Il a épousé Janet Gilchrist le 11 octobre 1519, à Edinburgh, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 1 janvier 1571, à Écosse, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Mungo Aitken wurde am 1. Januar 1501 in Edinburgh, Scotland, als Sohn von John Atkin und Margaret McLean geboren. Er hat am 11. Oktober 1519 in Edinburgh, Scotland Janet Gilchrist geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 1. Januar 1571 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Mungo Aitken è nato il il 1 gennaio 1501 nel Edinburgh, Scotland come figlio di John Atkin e Margaret McLean. Lui sposato Janet Gilchrist il 11 ottobre 1519, nel Edinburgh, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 1 gennaio 1571, nel Scotland, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mungo Aitkenは1501年1月1日にスコットランドエディンブルグでJohn AtkinとMargaret McLeanの息子として生まれた。1519年10月11日にスコットランドエディンブルグでJanet Gilchristと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1571年1月1日にスコットランドで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mungo Aitken(은)는 1501년 1월 1일 스컷랜드 에딘버그에서 John Atkin(와)과 Margaret McLean의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1519년 10월 11일 스컷랜드 에딘버그에서 Janet Gilchrist(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1571년 1월 1일 스컷랜드에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.1 January 1501–1 January 1571: 1 de janeiro de 1501–1 de janeiro de 1571
pt.lifeSummary: Mungo Aitken nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1501, em Edinburgh, Scotland filho de John Atkin e Margaret McLean. Ele casou-se com Janet Gilchrist em 11 de outubro de 1519, em Edinburgh, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de janeiro de 1571, em Scotland, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Mungo Aitken родился 1 января 1501 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия. Его родителей звали John Atkin и Margaret McLean. Он женился на женщине по имени Janet Gilchrist 11 октября 1519 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 1 января 1571 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Mungo Aitken nació el 1 de enero de 1501, en Edinburgh, Scotland como hijo de John Atkin y Margaret McLean. Se casó con Janet Gilchrist el 11 de octubre de 1519, en Edinburgh, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 1 de enero de 1571, en Scotland, a la edad de 70 años.
